statement: In every magma, Equation 2405 (`x = (y * (z * (z * y))) * w`) implies Equation 4681 (`(x * y) * z = (y * w) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0908
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z (op z y))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op (op x y) z) = (op (op y w) x)
